history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A blue promotional graphic shows a yellow checkmark icon above large Indonesian text and a partially visible button.

Main Subject:
The image focuses on a centered layout containing a yellow circular icon with a checkmark and stacked white text reading “Terbayar ke mhdilyasenzzu Rр5.000.000.000”, with a rounded white button area only partially visible at the bottom.

Setting:
This is a flat, digital graphic design on a solid blue background, with no outdoor or indoor environment shown.

Visual Details:
The background is a uniform medium-to-bright blue. Near the top center is a yellow circle with a subtle highlight and a white checkmark inside it. Below the icon, three lines of large bold white text are centered, with the first line reading “Terbayar ke,” the second line reading “mhdilyasenzzu,” and the third line reading “Rp5.000.000.000” in very large type. The bottom portion shows the top edge of a rounded white rectangular area, likely a button, with the word “DETAIL TRANSAKSI” partially cut off by the image edge.

Visible Text:
Terbayar ke
mhdilyasenzzu
Rр5.000.000.000
DETAIL TRANSAKSI

Practical Summary:
The image displays a blue payment/confirmation-style graphic with a checkmark icon and large white text. It also shows the top of a button labeled “DETAIL TRANSAKSI,” though the full button text is not fully visible.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

Terbayar ke  
mhdliyasenzzu  

Rp5.000.000  

DETAIL TRANSAKSI

# Structured Version

- **Terbayar ke:** mhdliyasenzzu  
- **Jumlah:** Rp5.000.000  
- **Judul/Bagian:** DETAIL TRANSAKSI  

# Notes

- Teks “DETAIL TRANSAKSI” terlihat sebagian (bagian bawah layar), namun terbaca jelas sebagai kata tersebut.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
